title: Avise Financial — Genuine Financial Advice

meta.description: Avise is a collective that helps good-hearted financial advisors start and operate their own independent firms. Our platform makes it easy for quality advisors to offer good advice to more people by making it simple to launch and run an RIA.
meta.og_description: Avise is a collective that helps good-hearted financial advisors start and operate their own independent firms. Our platform makes it easy for quality advisors to offer good advice to more people by making it simple to launch and run an RIA.

headings.text: Genuine financial advice for genuine people.
Avise is a collective that helps good-hearted financial advisors start and operate their own independent firms and work with more people like you.
Financial corporations spend hundreds of millions on advertising to capture your attention.
What does good financial advice look like?
Dealing with your money is already stressful; the last thing you should have to worry about is whether or not the professionals you’ve hired are genuine people.
Financial advice for people as real as you.

body_text:
Skip to Content
Our Team
For Advisors
Match With an Advisor
Genuine financial advice for genuine people.
We make it easy for you to connect with a personal financial advisor you love working with.
Avise is a collective that helps good-hearted financial advisors start and operate their own independent firms and work with more people like you.
Independent advisors don't answer to anyone but their clients. The advice you receive isn't influenced by any corporation or bank, meaning the advisor can freely recommend what's truly best.
We're on a mission to increase access to high-quality financial advice for more people.
That starts by opening the door to more diverse advisors who are passionate about true financial planning.
Are you an advisor?
Financial corporations spend hundreds of millions on advertising to capture your attention.
370k
Financial advisors in the U.S.
4%
Independent Advisors
Talented financial advisors who would rather focus on financial planning than making a sale struggle to get in front of you.
The challenge is that owning an advisory firm is complex and expensive. That’s where we come in.
What does good financial advice look like?
Avise makes it easy for good advisors to thrive, but it isn’t easy to qualify for our platform. We only allow highly qualified planners who have made it through our rigorous screening process.
1. Value-Aligned
2. Independent
3. Personal
4. Diverse
5. Transparent
Find Your Advisor
Dealing with your money is already stressful; the last thing you should have to worry about is whether or not the professionals you’ve hired are genuine people.
This motivates us at Avise. We want to make it easy to find sound advice through a fully transparent process.
Meet Our Founding Team
Here’s what to expect:
1.
Tell us about yourself so we can appropriately match you with an advisor you’ll thrive with.
2.
You’ll meet with your advisor so they can learn about your goals and you can ask questions to see if it’ll be a good fit.
3.
After you become a client, you’ll have an ongoing, 1-on-1 relationship with your independent advisor.
Financial advice for people as real as you.
Start Here
Genuine financial advice.
ADV  & CRS
Privacy Policy
Disclosure
© 2024 Avise Financial
Avise Financial Cooperative, Inc. is a registered investment adviser with the SEC and may only transact business with residents of states where the firm is registered or otherwise legally permitted subject to exemption or exclusion from registration requirements. Registration with the United States Securities and Exchange Commission or any state securities authority does not imply a certain level of skill or training.
